creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ cat x11-toolkits/qt5-gui/Makefile.local
BUILD_DEPENDS+= ${LOCALBASE}/include/vulkan/vulkan.h:devel/vulkan-headers

$ poudriere testport -j 121amd64 x11-toolkits/qt5-gui
